code.text: Specimen information

text.div:
Specimen information

Test02-SEP-2022Specimen
Appearance of UrineCloudy urineUrine
Odor of UrineUrine smell ammoniacalUrine
Clarity of UrineTranslucentUrine
Color of UrineBrown colorUrine

Annotation

Conclusion and Recommendations based on this report and previous findings known to us
The patient shows elevated serum creatinine, suggesting impaired renal function. Urinalysis reveals significant proteinuria, glucosuria, mild ketonuria, and abnormal urine appearance (cloudy, brown, ammoniacal), with low specific gravity. No evidence of urinary tract infection (negative nitrites, leukocytes). Findings are consistent with possible renal dysfunction, likely of glomerular origin; further nephrological evaluation is recommended.

coding.display: Microalbuminuria due to type 2 diabetes mellitus
Disorder of kidney due to diabetes mellitus
